name: CompTIA Network+
exam_format: CBT, max 90 items (MC + PBQ), 90 min, pass 720/900
notes: Flagship networking credential. Revises every ~3 years. N10-008 retired Dec 2024. Among the most-prepped CTE certs nationally.

name: CompTIA Security+
exam_format: CBT, max 90 items (MC + PBQ), 90 min, pass 750/900
notes: DoD 8570/8140 baseline. Most-prepped cybersecurity cert in CTE. SY0-601 retired Jul 2024. Vendor-neutral.

name: CompTIA CySA+
exam_format: CBT, max 85 items (MC + PBQ), 165 min, pass 750/900
notes: Intermediate SOC-analyst credential. CS0-004 expected early 2026. PS-dominant.

name: CompTIA PenTest+
exam_format: CBT, max 90 items (MC + PBQ), 165 min, pass 750/900
notes: Offensive security focus. PT0-002 retired Jun 2025. PS-only.

name: CompTIA SecurityX (formerly CASP+)
exam_format: CBT, max 90 items (MC + PBQ), 165 min, pass/fail
notes: Expert-level; rebranded from CASP+ Dec 2024. Not HS-viable.

name: ISC2 Certified in Cybersecurity (CC)
notes: Free exam + free self-paced training. Launched 2022. Strong HS entry. Low Ohio points (1 pt) despite industry recognition.

name: EC-Council Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH)
notes: High Ohio IRC (12 pt). Expensive (~$1200). PS-dominant. NY lists 'Ethical Hacking Associate' (EC-Council Academia version).

name: EC-Council Certified Cybersecurity Technician (CCT)
notes: Entry-level; vendor-neutral. Performance-based component strong for CTE. Newer (2022). Verify state adoption.

name: Cisco CCST Networking
notes: Entry-level networking. Launched 2023. Steps to CCNA. 5-year validity. Delivered via Certiport for academic.

name: Cisco CCST Cybersecurity
notes: Entry-level cybersecurity. Launched 2023. Steps to CyberOps Associate. Growing rapidly.

name: Cisco CCNA
notes: Classic networking credential. High Ohio IRC (12 pt). Typically 11th-12th or dual-enrollment. Networking Academy curriculum.

name: Cisco CyberOps Associate
notes: SOC analyst entry. Networking Academy pipeline. Good dual-enrollment fit.

name: Microsoft SC-900 (Security Compliance Identity Fundamentals)
notes: Cross-cutting Web & Cloud. Entry-level Microsoft security. Free training via MS Learn.

name: Certiport IT Specialist: Network Security
notes: HS-friendly entry. 5-year validity.

name: Certiport IT Specialist: Networking
notes: HS-friendly entry. Routers/switches/network hardware fundamentals.

name: Certiport IT Specialist: Device Configuration & Management
notes: Cross-cuts IT Support. Device config focus straddles both sub-clusters.

name: TestOut Network Pro
notes: Aligned with CompTIA Network+. Heavy simulation. Lab complement rather than standalone anchor.

name: TestOut Security Pro
notes: Aligned with CompTIA Security+. Lab complement rather than standalone anchor.

name: TestOut Routing & Switching Pro
notes: Aligned with Cisco CCNA. Prepares for both TestOut R&S Pro exam and CCNA 200-301.

name: Fortinet NSE 1-3 (Information Security Awareness / Associate)
exam_format: Self-paced online courses + quizzes (no proctored exam)
notes: Free self-paced. No proctored exam — course-completion only. Good supplemental. NSE 3 = FortiGate Operator level.

name: Fortinet NSE 4 (Network Security Professional)
notes: Vendor-specific (FortiGate). Ohio IRC 3 pt. PS-dominant. First proctored Fortinet exam.

name: Google Cybersecurity Professional Certificate
exam_format: Course completion + graded assessments across 8 courses
notes: Course-completion (not single proctored exam). Prepares for CompTIA Security+. 3-6 month self-paced. $49/mo.

name: AWS Certified Security - Specialty
notes: Expert-level cloud security. SCS-C02 retired Dec 2025. Not HS-viable.

name: Palo Alto Networks Certified Cybersecurity Apprentice
notes: Replaced PCCSA (retired Apr 2024). No prerequisites. Entry to Palo Alto cert ecosystem. Newer — verify state adoption.

name: Palo Alto Networks PCNSA
exam_format: CBT proctored via Pearson VUE, 80 items, 90 min
notes: Vendor-specific (NGFW). PCNSA retiring Jul 2025 under cert restructuring. PS-only.
